name: TenantScanGovernance
description: Semantic model for Microsoft Fabric tenant governance — defines entity types, relationships, and condition-action rules for the TenantScan Advisor.

TenantScanRun.description: A single governance scan execution with aggregate scores

score_rating.description: Rating label: Critical / Poor / Fair / Good / Excellent

pct_admin.description: Percentage of Admin roles across all workspaces

Finding.description: A specific governance issue detected during a scan

category.description: Category: Security / Naming / Capacity / Refresh / Description

severity.description: Severity: Critical / High / Medium / Low / Info

scan_date.description: Scan date this finding belongs to

Recommendation.description: An actionable recommendation linked to one or more findings

impact.description: Expected score impact: Low / Medium / High

api_endpoint.description: Fabric REST API endpoint for automated fix (Tier 3)

Workspace.description: A workspace in the Fabric tenant with governance metadata

item_count.description: Number of items in this workspace

has_description.description: Whether workspace has a description set

RoleAssignment.description: An RBAC role assignment linking a principal to a workspace

principal_type.description: Principal type: User / Group / ServicePrincipal / App

relationships.name: scan_produces_findings
relationships.description: A scan run produces zero or more governance findings

relationships.name: finding_affects_workspace
relationships.description: A finding affects a specific workspace
relationships.note: Linked via finding detail or workspace reference in the finding

relationships.name: finding_resolved_by_recommendation
relationships.description: A finding is resolved by applying a recommendation
relationships.note: Matched by category + severity → priority mapping

relationships.name: workspace_has_roles
relationships.description: A workspace has multiple role assignments

relationships.name: scan_covers_workspaces
relationships.description: A scan covers all workspaces in the tenant
relationships.note: Temporal join — workspaces snapshot per scan

conditionActionRules.name: critical_score_alert
conditionActionRules.description: Fire alert when overall score drops below critical threshold

action.message: Overall governance score fell to {overall_score}/100 — immediate review required.

conditionActionRules.name: score_drop_alert
conditionActionRules.description: Fire alert when score drops 5+ points between consecutive scans

action.message: Score dropped from {PREVIOUS(overall_score)} to {overall_score} (−{PREVIOUS(overall_score) - overall_score} pts).

conditionActionRules.name: admin_role_bloat
conditionActionRules.description: Warn when admin roles exceed 30% of total assignments

action.message: Admin role percentage is {pct_admin * 100}% — exceeds 30% recommended threshold.

conditionActionRules.name: new_critical_finding
conditionActionRules.description: Fire alert when a new Critical-severity finding appears

action.channel: Power Automate → Teams Adaptive Card + Email

conditionActionRules.name: unassigned_capacity_warning
conditionActionRules.description: Warn when workspaces exist without capacity assignment

action.message: Workspace '{name}' has no capacity assigned — running on shared capacity.

dataAgent.name: TenantScan-Advisor
instructions: You are the TenantScan Governance Advisor. Use the TenantScanGovernance ontology as your primary semantic layer.
Entity types available: TenantScanRun, Finding, Recommendation, Workspace, RoleAssignment.
Use GQL queries for relationship traversals (e.g., 'which workspaces have admin bloat AND critical findings').
Use DAX for real-time score calculations and the semantic model.
When asked 'what if' questions, traverse Finding → Recommendation relationships to estimate score impact.
Always reference entities by their ontology names, not raw table/column names.
Support group-by in GQL queries for aggregation across entity relationships.
When explaining your reasoning, reference the ontology graph path (e.g., TenantScanRun → Finding → Workspace → RoleAssignment).

operationsAgent.name: TenantScan-Watchdog
instructions: Monitor the TenantScanGovernance ontology for condition-action rule triggers.
Use the conditionActionRules defined in the ontology — do not hardcode thresholds.
Route alerts through Activator → Power Automate based on severity.
Critical alerts: Teams Adaptive Card + Email to tenant admins.
Warning alerts: Teams Adaptive Card only.
Info alerts: Log to Lakehouse audit table.
